estimated_cost_impact_reasoning: WuXi STA removal: emergency CDMO transition adds +$820/kg API. Amide Coupling, Cyclisation, and Salt Formation GMP steps must be transferred. Source: MRP cdmo_removal_scenarios, wuxi_sta.
estimated_timeline_reasoning: GMP site qualification critical path: 18 weeks (tech transfer + regulatory filing + first GMP batch). SM-A re-qualification runs in parallel.
caveats: Emergency premium assumes alternative CDMO exists with available capacity — not confirmed.
18-week timeline assumes no regulatory hold on the tech transfer filing.
